requirement_topic.en: Residual Current and Electric Shock Protection

summary.en: Myanmar EV charger installations should provide shock protection, leakage protection, protective earthing, overcurrent protection, and safe isolation suitable for the site supply. MSTRD, MEPE, ESE, project engineers, or installers may ask for IEC 61851 and IEC 60364 evidence, especially for public or commercial sites.
summary.zh: 缅甸电动汽车充电桩安装应提供适合场地供电的触电保护、漏电保护、保护接地、过流保护和安全隔离。MSTRD、MEPE、ESE、项目工程师或安装方可能要求 IEC 61851 和 IEC 60364 证据，尤其是公共或商业场地。
summary.zht: 緬甸電動汽車充電樁安裝應提供適合場地供電的觸電保護、漏電保護、保護接地、過流保護和安全隔離。MSTRD、MEPE、ESE、項目工程師或安裝方可能要求 IEC 61851 和 IEC 60364 證據，尤其是公共或商業場地。

standards_or_laws: MEPE or ESE site acceptance requirements

summary.en: China EV chargers commonly rely on GB/T 18487 leakage and safety requirements, GB/T 20234 connector safety, CPCNEC safety documentation, and CCC baseline testing where applicable.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩通常依赖 GB/T 18487 漏电和安全要求、GB/T 20234 接口安全、CPCNEC 安全文件，以及适用时的 CCC 基线测试。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁通常依賴 GB/T 18487 漏電和安全要求、GB/T 20234 接口安全、CPCNEC 安全文件，以及適用時的 CCC 基線測試。

gap.en: A China protection design may be technically sound but still needs Myanmar site documentation. The file should state RCD or RDC-DD strategy, earthing assumptions, isolation monitoring for DC chargers, upstream breaker sizing, and installer responsibilities.
gap.zh: 中国保护设计可能技术上可行，但仍需要缅甸现场文件。文件应说明 RCD 或 RDC-DD 策略、接地假设、直流充电桩绝缘监测、上游断路器规格以及安装方责任。
gap.zht: 中國保護設計可能技術上可行，但仍需要緬甸現場文件。文件應說明 RCD 或 RDC-DD 策略、接地假設、直流充電樁絕緣監測、上游斷路器規格以及安裝方責任。

mandatory_status.target: Required as part of safe installation and utility or project acceptance, even if no separate national EVSE protection certificate is confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic safety and certification expectations apply where in scope

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Provide a Myanmar installation protection schedule. Do not rely on a China safety report without explaining the protection architecture for the local site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应提供缅甸安装保护配置表。不得只依赖中国安全报告而不说明当地场地的保护架构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應提供緬甸安裝保護配置表。不得只依賴中國安全報告而不說明當地場地的保護架構。

summary.en: Outdoor EV chargers in Myanmar should be designed for local weather, lightning exposure, earthing quality, surge protection, enclosure IP rating, heat, humidity, and grid disturbances. Project engineers or utilities may require surge protective devices and site-specific earthing or lightning protection measures.
summary.zh: 缅甸户外电动汽车充电桩应按当地天气、雷电暴露、接地质量、浪涌保护、外壳 IP 等级、高温、湿度和电网扰动设计。项目工程师或电力单位可能要求配置浪涌保护器及现场特定接地或防雷措施。
summary.zht: 緬甸戶外電動汽車充電樁應按當地天氣、雷電暴露、接地質量、浪湧保護、外殼 IP 等級、高溫、濕度和電網擾動設計。項目工程師或電力單位可能要求配置浪湧保護器及現場特定接地或防雷措施。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61643 surge protective device practice where specified
MEPE or ESE site acceptance requirements

summary.en: China chargers may include surge protection, IP rating, temperature rating, and GB/T 18487 or CPCNEC safety evidence, but these are often documented for China site assumptions.
summary.zh: 中国充电桩可能包含浪涌保护、IP 等级、温度等级以及 GB/T 18487 或 CPCNEC 安全证据，但这些文件通常按中国场地假设编制。
summary.zht: 中國充電樁可能包含浪湧保護、IP 等級、溫度等級以及 GB/T 18487 或 CPCNEC 安全證據，但這些文件通常按中國場地假設編製。

gap.en: Myanmar outdoor deployment may demand stronger site adaptation than the China baseline. Exporters should document SPD type, upstream protection, earthing resistance assumptions, enclosure rating, thermal derating, and maintenance inspection intervals.
gap.zh: 缅甸户外部署可能比中国基线需要更强的现场适配。出口商应说明 SPD 类型、上游保护、接地电阻假设、外壳等级、热降额以及维护检查周期。
gap.zht: 緬甸戶外部署可能比中國基線需要更強的現場適配。出口商應說明 SPD 類型、上游保護、接地電阻假設、外殼等級、熱降額以及維護檢查週期。

mandatory_status.target: Project and utility acceptance item; mandatory where specified by site design, tender, or electrical inspection
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic protection design applies to China installations and does not automatically settle Myanmar site protection

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Outdoor Myanmar installations should include a local surge, earthing, IP, and thermal design check. Treat this as a site engineering requirement, not just a product certificate item.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缅甸户外安装应包括当地浪涌、接地、IP 和热设计核查。应将其视为现场工程要求，而不仅是产品证书事项。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 緬甸戶外安裝應包括當地浪湧、接地、IP 和熱設計核查。應將其視為現場工程要求，而不僅是產品證書事項。
